creator: scheidell@secnap.net
text:
Looks like (at least) it didn't make it into 6.4 release, and also, the 
'delay(10)/ delay(11) seems to be why it seems intermentent, when a 
'fix' I thought I found worked, or, when SOMETIMES the old kernel won't 
even boot (after a 'nextboot -k testkernel') due to something hosing the 
acpi.

(poweroff and boot old kernel seemed to work every time)
